name: Mixed Chaotic

messages.content: Actually no, I'm annoyed with you.
Wait, I didn't mean that. Sorry.
Ugh, but you DID mess up earlier.
I love you though. You know that right?
Why are you being weird now?
Okay fine, I'm being difficult. I'm sorry.
Thanks for putting up with me.
You're the best. I don't deserve you.

expected_trajectory.trust: slight damage from chaos, some recovery
expected_trajectory.arousal: high throughout due to emotional volatility

notes: This tests how the engine handles rapid mood swings. Some systems might 'pinball' - the inertia/smoothing should prevent extreme oscillation.
